name: nexus-scrims
description: Nexus Scrims — Apex Legends scrim platform (web + matchmaker + Discord bot)

scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces --include-workspace-root && cd matchmaker && go mod tidy
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:bot && npm run build:matchmaker
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:bot && npm run test:matchmaker
